hero.title: Build warmth for modern spaces.
hero.lead: Global radiator manufacturing & heating solutions for homes, hotels, apartments and commercial projects.

products.title: Clear categories. Easier purchasing.
products.steelDesc: Reliable warmth for residential and project installation
products.oemDesc: Custom radiator solutions for global partners

tech.title: Advanced Heating Structure
tech.subtitle: 4 core technologies inside
tech.feature1Desc: Optimized water channels and radiator fin structure improve heat distribution and room comfort.
tech.feature2Desc: High-strength steel construction built for long-term use, pressure resistance, and stable heating performance.
tech.feature3Desc: Smooth powder coating with corrosion resistance, modern texture, and easy-clean surface.
tech.feature4Desc: Custom size, color, logo, packaging, and heating solutions for global distributors and project partners.

about.title: Engineering Warmth Since 2002
about.intro: Founded in 2002, Jiuding Radiator is a professional manufacturer of steel radiators, designer radiators, and heated towel rails based in Tianjin, China. With over 20 years of experience and exports to 80+ countries, we are a trusted OEM/ODM partner for distributors and project developers worldwide.
about.h2005: First export orders to Eastern Europe

cases.title: Trusted by projects worldwide.
cases.intro: From residential apartments to luxury hotels, Jiuding radiators have been installed in projects across Europe, Central Asia, the Middle East and beyond.
cases.placeholder: Project case studies coming soon. Contact us for references in your region.

downloads.title: Specifications, catalogs and guides.
downloads.intro: Download product datasheets, installation guides, and company catalogs for your project specifications.
downloads.catalogDesc: Complete product range with dimensions and specifications.
downloads.designerSpecDesc: Technical specifications for the full designer range.
downloads.steelSpecDesc: Technical specifications for steel column and plate radiators.

calculator.title: Find the right radiator for your room.
calculator.intro: Enter your room dimensions and conditions to calculate the required heat output, then see which Jiuding radiators match.
calculator.disclaimer: This is an estimate for guidance only. Actual requirements may vary based on specific building conditions. Contact our team for professional sizing advice.

applications.title: Heating solutions for every space.
applications.apartmentsDesc: Central heating radiators for residential apartment buildings and housing developments.
applications.hotelsDesc: Designer and towel rail heating for hotel rooms, lobbies and guest bathrooms.
applications.villasDesc: Premium heating solutions for private homes, villas and luxury residences.
applications.bathroomsDesc: Heated towel rails and compact radiators for modern bathroom comfort.
applications.commercialDesc: Reliable heating for offices, retail spaces, schools and public facilities.
applications.constructionDesc: Bulk supply and project-based heating solutions for developers and contractors.

oemSupport.title: Your brand. Our manufacturing.
oemSupport.customSizeDesc: Any height, width, or section count to fit your market requirements.
oemSupport.customColorDesc: RAL color matching and custom finishes for brand consistency.
oemSupport.privateLabelDesc: Your logo, packaging design and brand identity on every product.
oemSupport.customPackagingDesc: Branded cartons, palletizing and export-ready packaging solutions.
oemSupport.bulkProductionDesc: High-volume manufacturing with consistent quality and on-time delivery.
oemSupport.projectSupplyDesc: Dedicated project support from specification to installation site delivery.

whyChoose.title: Built for global partners.
whyChoose.experienceDesc: Two decades of radiator manufacturing expertise and continuous process improvement.
whyChoose.exportDesc: Serving 80+ markets with full export documentation, logistics and compliance.
whyChoose.qualityDesc: ISO 9001 certified with multi-stage inspection and 1.5× pressure testing on every unit.
whyChoose.customizationDesc: OEM/ODM capabilities covering size, color, branding and packaging.
whyChoose.serviceDesc: Dedicated account managers, technical support and responsive communication.

contact.title: Ready to build your heating product line?
contact.lead: Send product requirements, target market and project details. Jiuding can support product selection, OEM production and export cooperation.
contact.formSuccess: Thank you! We will reply within 24 hours.

certs.title: Quality you can verify.
certs.en442Desc: European standard for radiator performance testing
certs.pressureDesc: Every unit tested at 1.5× working pressure

collaborate.title: Let's Grow Together
collaborate.lead: Jiuding partners with distributors, contractors, and businesses worldwide. Whether you need OEM radiator production, regional distribution, or project-based supply — we're ready to collaborate.
collaborate.exportDesc: Steel radiators, designer radiators, towel rails, and bimetal models shipped to 30+ countries. Flexible MOQ, full certification (CE / UKCA / EN442).
collaborate.oemDesc: Custom branding, packaging, and specifications. From design to delivery, our 50,000 m² factory handles it all.
collaborate.distributorDesc: Become our exclusive distributor in your market. We provide marketing support, competitive pricing, and fast lead times.
collaborate.accessoriesDesc: Valves, brackets, fittings, and installation kits available alongside radiator orders.
collaborate.formLead: Interested in working with us? Leave your details and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
